prestazioni: Engine swap to Mazda's MZR 2.3L DISI Turbo (L3-VDT) from the Mazdaspeed6, reinforced with a forged internals kit by Manley (87mm forged crank, Carrillo H-beam rods, and JE 9.5:1 compression pistons) for 450whp on E85 with a Garrett GTX4202R turbo (0.86 A/R, billet compressor wheel) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe by CorkSport

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a PPF (Power Plant Frame) brace by Racing Beat, a carbon fiber driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop (rated for 800hp), and a Quaife ATB LSD (QDF7Z) with 4.10 final gearing in the RX-8 FD3S differential housing for optimal torque transfer

Custom ECU calibration by VersaTuner with a standalone Haltech Elite 2500, featuring flex-fuel sensor integration, dual Bosch 028 injectors (1,600cc), and a custom intercooler core by PWR (800hp-rated, 4.5" thick) with a 3.5" silicone charge pipe system by Vibrant Performance
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Rocket Bunny V3 Shinari-specific kit (overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser), paired with a custom 3D-printed rear wing by APR Performance (GT-500 style, 65" span, 3D carbon fiber construction)

Custom LED headlight retrofit with Osram 850 Xenarc bulbs, Hella Dynamic Cornering Lights, and a full carbon fiber hood by Seibon (with integrated NACA ducts for intercooler airflow), finished in Mazda's signature Soul Red Crystal paint with a 3M Matte Black roof wrap

Interior overhaul featuring Recaro SPG XL seats (with custom Shinari embroidery), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), a full carbon fiber dash overlay by Varis, and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded, with integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses)
